elements.name: Description
texts: "Being far from the ocean when the stormy wind rose..."

elements.name: Source
texts: The Pettigo History Trail: A Production of the Pettigo Mens' Group 2007, ed. by John B. Cunningham, p. 21

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts:
"Being far from the ocean when the stormy wind rose
Which filled our heart sorely with great grief and woe
Going past the Priors Island as now was our cry
God have mercy on our souls if in the deep we must lie."
